title: Borrow/Return Management
description: Manage borrow records in the library system
addDescription: Add a new borrow record to the system
search: Reader name, card number, book title...
deleteConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to delete borrow record "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.
dueDateAutoHint: Calculated from borrow date and the reader type’s loan period.
renewHint: Once per loan; extends due date by the reader type borrow period (days). After the new due date, the scheduled job marks overdue if not returned.
returnConfirmDescription: Are you sure you want to mark this book as returned? Reader: {{name}}, Book: {{book}}
redirectDamagedFineToast: Record saved. Opening add-fine form with damaged-book amount from rules.
redirectDamagedFineRulesError: Could not load fine rules. A default fixed amount was filled in — please verify before saving.
redirectLostFineToast: Record saved. Opening add-fine form with lost-book amount from rules.
redirectLostFineRulesError: Could not load lost-book rules. A default fixed amount was filled in — please verify before saving.
renewalFeeHint: Defaults to the renewal fee in Fine rules (editable before save). Cash at desk is recorded and the due date is extended.
renewalFeeInvalid: Please enter a valid renewal fee (≥ 0).
renewOfflineSuccess: Counter renewal completed and fee recorded.
